title: 1 Part The Lower Spray Arm Compatible For Midea Dishwasher WQP8-W3909E-CN 12176000026131
features: Precisely matched model: This under-spray arm is compatible with washing machine models such as WQP8-W3909E-CN, with the corresponding component number being 12176000026131. It can precisely match the washing system of the corresponding model, providing a suitable option for the replacement of the equipment's under-spray arm and ensuring stable operation after installation.

Single-component supply design: Adopting a 1-part (single) packaging design, it precisely meets the replacement needs of the under-spray arm for a single washing machine, without the need to purchase additional components, avoiding waste of resources, and offering higher cost-effectiveness.

Core under-spray function: As the key spray component at the bottom of the washing machine, it is responsible for spraying high-pressure water to the lower area of the washing machine's dishes, covering the inside and outside of the bowls and plates as well as the bottom, effectively removing food residues and stains, and improving the washing effect of the lower dishes.

Optimized spray layout: The spray holes are designed with a scientific arrangement, combined with the characteristics of water pressure, to evenly distribute the washing water to all corners of the lower washing space, ensuring that every part of the dishes can be thoroughly rinsed, reducing washing blind spots.

Durable structural characteristics: Made of materials suitable for the working environment of the washing machine, it has good corrosion resistance and impact resistance, capable of withstanding long-term water flow and washing liquid erosion, not deforming or damaging easily, and extending the service life.
